questions.question: 2001's film "Zoolander" tells the tale of an egotistical male model played by which actor?
After achieving success playing drums for Nirvana, this singer and multi-instrumentalist founded another popular act, Foo Fighters.
Directed by Sam Raimi, 2002's "Spider-Man" features a memorable upside-down kiss scene between Tobey Maguire and this actress.
President Bush created this federal department to fight terrorism in 2002.
Leonardo DiCaprio stars in this 2002 crime film as con man Frank Abagnale Jr., posing as a pilot, doctor, and prosecutor as he eludes an FBI agent.
